description: Sex Money Murder is a set of the Bloods street gang operating on the East Coast of the United States, founded in the Soundview section of the Bronx, New York, on September 27, 1995, by Peter "Pistol Pete" Rollock. Originally a subset of the United Blood Nation, it later gained independence and is involved in drug trafficking, racketeering, armed robbery, assault, and murder. The gang has spread to the southern United States, particularly North Carolina and Georgia.
